channel.title: K8s on Frank Huang
channel.description: Recent content in K8s on Frank Huang

item.title: k8s first try
item.description: Template for defining yaml file for orchestration: apiVersion: v1 kind: Pod/Deployment metadata: name: labels: app: web Spec: replicas: 2 containers: - name: image: command: args: workingDir: ports: env: resources: volumeMounts: livenessProbe: readinessProbe: lifecycle: terminationMessagePath: imagePullPolicy: securityContext: stdin: stdinOnce: tty: use kubectl explain to check out term storage template for defining storage.yaml: kind: StorageClass apiVersion: storage.k8s.io/v1 metadata: name: jupyterhub-share namespace: jhub provisioner: kubernetes.io/no-provisioner what is the relationship between pv, pvc and storage?
